description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly red exterior and prominent Coca-Cola branding. The front face features a large product display window, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot near the bottom. The sides are decorated with the Coca-Cola logo in white script against a red background, while the back is plain and unadorned. The machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal, with some plastic and glass components for the display and interface areas. The surface is glossy and hard, reflecting light and giving the machine a sleek, modern appearance. The overall design is typical of beverage vending machines found in urban public spaces.
description: A red, rectangular Coca-Cola vending machine with a product display, payment interface, and retrieval slot on the front. Glossy, hard surfaces and bold branding make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product display, payment interface, and retrieval slot, with detailed Coca-Cola branding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the large white Coca-Cola logo on a red background; payment interface is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, plain and unmarked, with a solid black surface and no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with the Coca-Cola logo and red background.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is visible on the upper front, showing product images and possibly digital information; it is medium-sized and vertically oriented.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the front, including a coin slot and bill acceptor, located to the right of the display panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Several individual product selection buttons are visible on the front, arranged vertically next to the display panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower front, with a dark flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large white Coca-Cola logos are present on both sides and the front, with red backgrounds and additional product imagery on the front panel.
